**The Boston Celtics are reportedly in talks to trade Jaylen Brown, with a new Western Conference contender emerging as a potential suitor.** 
## Context / Background
The Celtics have been active in trade discussions this offseason, with Brown being one of the key players involved in the rumors. The team is looking to shake up its roster after a disappointing playoff run last season. 
## Tactical Key Points / Stats Table
| Team | Player | Stats |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Celtics | Jaylen Brown | 23.6 PPG, 6.9 RPG, 3.5 APG |
## Recent Developments
The Celtics have been linked to several players, including Evan Mobley, as they look to rebuild their roster. However, the team's relationship with Brown is reportedly beyond repair, making a trade increasingly likely. 
> The Celtics are closer than ever to trading Jaylen Brown, according to Chris Mannix. 
## What's Next?
The Celtics will continue to explore trade options for Brown, with several teams expected to be involved in the discussions. The team's offseason plans will likely become clearer in the coming weeks.
